settings.scaffold: This is a scaffolded settings panel. The next step can connect this area to real forms and policies.
settings.title: Settings
settings.navigation.personal.description: Profile, appearance, language, notifications and security.
settings.navigation.about_and_legal.desc: Read about the platform, imprint and data protection.
settings.navigation.world_builder.descri: Worlds, maps, nodes, activity graphs and portal routes.
settings.navigation.edit_world.descripti: Maps, nodes, activities and portal links.
settings.navigation.assets.description: Media, sounds, reusable tools, consumable items and future currencies.
settings.navigation.assets_world_objects: Media, sounds, reusable tools, consumable items and future currencies.
settings.navigation.access.description: Users, registration tokens, roles, permissions and account access.
settings.navigation.presentation_localiz: Public pages, authentication screens, cursors, colors and languages.
settings.navigation.presentation.descrip: Welcome, auth backgrounds and public information pages.
settings.navigation.color_palette.descri: Edit color fields from presentation, journal and maps in one place.
settings.navigation.sounds.description: Reusable music, ambience, voices and sound effects.
settings.navigation.journal.description: Learner reflection pages and optional expert feedback consent.
settings.navigation.learning_support.des: Journal settings, reflection support and future competence views.
settings.navigation.languages.descriptio: Import and maintain platform and activity translations.
settings.navigation.ai.description: Provider credentials, agent templates and guarded usage limits.
settings.navigation.ai_integrations.desc: Provider credentials, agent templates, instruction sets and future integrations.
settings.ai.title: AI support
settings.ai.sections.providers.descripti: Encrypted API credentials and provider-level budgets.
settings.ai.sections.templates.descripti: Reusable task behaviors for design, assets and feedback.
settings.ai.sections.guardrails.descript: How sensitive context and limits should be handled.
settings.ai.providers.description: Store encrypted credentials and coarse budgets for one AI provider account.
settings.ai.providers.fields.label: Label
settings.ai.providers.placeholders.base_: Optional for local or compatible providers
settings.ai.providers.placeholders.api_k: Paste a key to store it encrypted
settings.ai.providers.enabled_label: Provider may be used by enabled templates
settings.ai.templates.description: Define a reusable behavior. Runtime jobs can later execute these templates with guarded context.
settings.ai.templates.fields.name: Name
settings.ai.templates.placeholders.slug: Generated from the name when empty
settings.ai.templates.instructions.title: Agent instructions
settings.ai.templates.instructions.descr: Download these prompts as a Markdown file, edit them elsewhere, or upload a prepared instruction set. Shared examples live in
settings.ai.templates.alerts.instruction: The selected instruction file could not be read. Use Markdown with "## System prompt" and "## Task prompt" sections, or a JSON file with systemPrompt and taskPrompt fields.
settings.ai.templates.enabled_label: Template may be used by future runtime jobs
settings.ai.guardrails.title: Recommended AI structure
settings.ai.guardrails.description: Use separate templates by responsibility. A single provider key can be shared when trust and limits match, but learner feedback should stay guarded.
settings.ai.guardrails.admin.title: Admin design helper
settings.ai.guardrails.admin.body: Reviews platform and activity design through the Self-Determination Theory lens without seeing private learner journal content.
settings.ai.guardrails.asset.title: Asset helper
settings.ai.guardrails.asset.body: Generates prompts or visual concepts. It usually needs no learner data and can safely use a separate cheaper model.
settings.ai.guardrails.feedback.title: Feedback helper
settings.ai.guardrails.feedback.body: Handles learner reflections only through explicit activity runs, with guarded context and stricter quotas.
world.search.empty: No visible maps or tiles found.
world.search.label: Search maps and tiles
world.search.mobile_prompt: Enter a word to search visible maps and tiles.
world.search.title: Map search
activities.item_grant.error: The item grant could not be resolved right now.
settings.access.title: Access management
settings.access.description: Configure who can read, update or delete administration areas. Default roles stay available.
settings.access.users.title: Users
settings.access.users.description: Manage registration tokens and account access. Token plaintext is shown only once after creation.
settings.access.users.details.descriptio: Read-only account and registration-token audit details.
settings.access.users.details.no_token: No registration token is linked to this account.
settings.access.tokens.dialog_descriptio: Choose the roles this one-use token grants and optionally set an expiration date.
settings.access.roles.title: Roles
settings.access.roles.description: Select a role to inspect or edit.
settings.access.roles.name: Name
settings.access.permissions.ro_legend: read only. The role may inspect the area but not save changes.
settings.access.permissions.ru_legend: read and update. The role may edit existing content and create new content.
settings.access.permissions.rud_legend: read, update and delete. The role may remove records where the feature supports deletion.
settings.personal.title: Personal settings
settings.personal.profile.title: Profile details
settings.personal.profile.description: Update account details and the public identity shown to other people later on.
settings.personal.profile.name: Name
settings.personal.profile.username.hint: Optional. Use letters, numbers, dashes and underscores. This is the name intended for public learning spaces.
settings.personal.profile.email_sent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.
settings.personal.profile.image.descript: Upload an image that can represent you in shared learning spaces. The file path is saved only when you press Save.
settings.personal.profile.image.upload_e: The profile image could not be uploaded.
settings.personal.appearance.title: Visual mode
settings.personal.appearance.description: Choose the appearance used after signing in.
settings.personal.notifications.title: Communication preferences
settings.personal.notifications.descript: This area will hold optional reminders, quiet hours and communication preferences. It will remain opt-in and avoid pressure-based learning loops.
settings.personal.sound.ambience.descrip: Looped background audio and environmental layers.
settings.personal.sound.description: Control optional effects and ambient sound for your own session without changing the learning world for others.
settings.personal.sound.effects.descript: Clicks, interaction feedback and short one-shot sounds.
settings.personal.sound.preview.descript: Sound playback now uses these values whenever a map, tool or activity plays optional audio.
settings.personal.sound.title: Audio preferences
settings.personal.security.title: Update password
settings.personal.security.description: Use a long, random password to keep your account secure.
settings.personal.language.description: Choose the language used for platform controls and learner-visible activity copy.
settings.administration.languages.title: Languages
settings.administration.languages.descri: Create supported languages and import translated platform and activity catalogs.
settings.administration.languages.catalo: Export English, translate its JSON values, then upload it here. The import keeps only learner-visible activity copy and ignores answer correctness or graph behavior.
settings.administration.languages.defaul: English is the canonical source. Download it to prepare another language.
settings.administration.languages.name: Language name
settings.administration.languages.enable: Disabled languages remain editable but cannot be selected by learners.
settings.assets.title: Assets & World Objects
settings.assets.sections.media.descripti: Manage reusable images, backgrounds and animations.
settings.assets.sections.sounds.descript: Manage reusable music, ambience, voices and sound effects.
settings.assets.sections.tools.descripti: Create reusable learner tools for obstacle activities.
settings.assets.sections.items.descripti: Create consumable inventory objects for item-based activities.
settings.assets.sections.currencies.desc: Future non-pressure resource concepts, if ever needed.
settings.assets.images.select_existing_d: Reuse uploaded or bundled assets instead of adding duplicates.
settings.assets.sounds.select_existing_d: Reuse uploaded or bundled audio with its metadata.
